retrieved_result: Don't Ignore Minor Infections Don't Ignore Minor Infections Information about mild or serious infections will help you understand the importance of your own hygiene as well as increase your appreciation of the complexity of the nail area and make you aware of when a patient needs medical care.by Orville J.
